SAMANDIRA METRO - ÜSKÜDAR

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. From Üsküdar Square, get off at Bağlarbaşı-Altunizade with Kadıköy buses and minibuses. İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. 500 m after reaching the Guest House.

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the main road. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the student guesthouse at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.
